summary: Removed read-only annotation (Cobra mcp:read-only and typed-MCP readOnlyHint) from generated endpoint mirrors that bill Sumble credits.
reason: The generator marks GET/search endpoints mcp:read-only (correct for 'no state mutation'), but Sumble is usage-based: these reads cost credits (e.g. intelligence-brief 50, organizations find 5/org). Read-only would let an MCP agent call them without a confirmation prompt, defeating the CLI's credit-frugality goal.
